heading_content_part: Privacy Policy | OGUREC APPSSkip to the content.Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyLast Updated: Friday, 6th August 2021If you choose to use any of OGUREC APPS products, you agree to the collection and use of personal information in relation with this policy. To operate and manage our services we need to use third party service providers from time to time. A list of those parties can be found in this privacy policies. The type of information we might collect from them includes:Device data

Such as Screen size, Battery Charge Level, Time zone, etcApp dataSuch as Bundle ID, store URL, session length, session IDAd dataImpression Count per session, Click count, Finish count, total impression countAdvertisingAdvertisements from third party ad networks may be displayed in our Games from time to time. All reasonable endeavours are used to ensure that these ad networks comply with all applicable legislation in the provision of their services towards us.

If you click on any advertisements through Our games, the advertisers may use cookies and other web-tracking technologies to collect data, to provide targeted advertisements to you. Some of this may be personal information, and some of it non-person

al information. Collection of other ‘Non-Personal’ InformationSome non-personal information may be gathered while you use Our games. Non-personal information is general, non-identifiable and anonymous information that is gathered for statistical, analytical and research purposes such as the improvement of our games (for example, bug fixes).
